name: slack-webhook-listener
description: Receive and verify Slack event webhook payloads. Validates the Slack signing secret, filters by channel and event type, and outputs structured event data.

SIGNING_SECRET_PATH.description: Secret path for the Slack app signing secret (e.g. 'slack/signing_secret')

CHANNEL_FILTER.description: Optional channel ID to filter events. Only events from this channel will be processed.

EVENT_TYPES.description: Optional list of Slack event types to process (e.g. ['message', 'app_mention']). All events processed if omitted.

OUTPUT_FORMAT.description: Output format: 'raw' returns full Slack payload, 'simplified' returns key fields, 'enriched' adds metadata.

setup_instructions.title: Enable Event Subscriptions in your Slack app
setup_instructions.detail: In your Slack app settings, go to 'Event Subscriptions' and toggle it on. Set the Request URL to your Talos webhook endpoint.

setup_instructions.title: Subscribe to bot events
setup_instructions.detail: Under 'Subscribe to bot events', add the event types you want to receive (e.g. 'message.channels', 'app_mention').

setup_instructions.title: Copy the signing secret
setup_instructions.detail: In 'Basic Information', find 'App Credentials' and copy the 'Signing Secret'.
